activity_1_b.text:

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: They fixed the door of the room last night.
He corrected the design on paper a while ago.
The wood was strong and dry yesterday.
They carried the sand for the bricks on their backs.

மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පදයන් පින්තූර සමග ගැලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கேட்டு, இடைவெளியைப் பயன்படுத்தி பதிலளியுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரி பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிடுங்கள்.

tables: I play the piano every day.

dialogues.text_b: We studied our notes all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: We waited at the service centre all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?

activity_a.text:
Put the words in the correct order. The first word in each sentence is in bold.
වචන නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට තබන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය තද අකුරින් ලියවා ඇත.
சொற்களை சரியான வரிசையில் வைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்திலும் முதல் வார்த்தை திட எழுத்தில் உள்ளது.

content.sentence: She painted the old concrete mixer yesterday.
He opened the storage container last Wednesday.
They washed the dusty scaffolding boards yesterday.
I collected the floor plans last Tuesday.
We repaired the broken wheelbarrow last month.
She finished the measurement report yesterday afternoon.
He started the construction course in 2021.
They placed safety barriers along the footpath.
I cleaned the storage shed two days ago.
We mailed the building approval documents yesterday.

activity_b.text: She painted the old concrete mixer yesterday.

They washed the dusty scaffolding boards yesterday.

She finished the measurement report yesterday afternoon.

We mailed the building approval documents yesterday.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the recording and match the words to the  pictures. 
පටිගත කිරීම අසන්න සහ වචන පින්තූර සමඟ ගැලපෙන්න.
பதிவை கேட்டு, சொற்களை படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Questions.question: Why was the cement mixer making a rattling sound?
options: The drive belt was very loose.

Questions.question: Why is the concrete cutter cabinet door not closing properly?
What problem did the scaffold rack have?
Questions.answer: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
options: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
It was unstable and all the screws were missing.

Questions.question: Why is the laser level display still unclear?
Questions.answer: The internal bulb might be failing.
options: The internal bulb might be failing.
The internal bulb might have broken.

Questions.question: Why was the water pump shaking unusually?

activity_c.text: Good morning, sir. The site workshop is a bit noisy today.
I think the cement mixer is making an unusual rattling sound.
Morning, Nalin. I’ve been checking the equipment since 7 a.m.
When I checked the mixer earlier, the drive belt was loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a light knocking noise.
I also noticed the concrete cutter cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but this morning the main door hinge is bent and it is not closing properly.
Yes, the hinge was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace it later.
Can you also check the scaffold storage rack?
The trainees cleaned it yesterday evening, but today it looked unstable on one side.
I inspected it.
One supporting screw was missing, so I added a new one.
But that rack was unstable for a long time.
We might need a brand-new frame.
Another thing, the laser level display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the screen, but the numbers are still unclear.
I tested the wiring this morning.
Everything was normal, but the internal bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement unit.
Finally, the water pump was shaking unusually.
When I opened the top cover, the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I’ll inspect the bearings after lunch.
Thank you, sir. We can’t continue the concrete work until these are sorted out.
No worries. I’ll finish all remaining checks before 11.30 a.m.

activity_d.text: Good morning, sir. The site workshop is a bit noisy today.
I think the cement mixer is making an unusual rattling sound.
Morning, Nalin. I’ve been checking the equipment since 7 a.m.
When I checked the mixer earlier, the drive belt was loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a light knocking noise.
I also noticed the concrete cutter cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but this morning the main door hinge is bent and it is not closing properly.
Yes, the hinge was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace it later.
Can you also check the scaffold storage rack?
The trainees cleaned it yesterday evening, but today it looked unstable on one side.
I inspected it.
One supporting screw was missing, so I added a new one.
But that rack was unstable for a long time.
We might need a brand-new frame.
Another thing, the laser level display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the screen, but the numbers are still unclear.
I tested the wiring this morning.
Everything was normal, but the internal bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement unit.
Finally, the water pump was shaking unusually.
When I opened the top cover, the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I’ll inspect the bearings after lunch.
Thank you, sir. We can’t continue the concrete work until these are sorted out.
No worries. I’ll finish all remaining checks before 11.30 a.m.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම පියවරන් ඔබට මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උදව් කරනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
වීඩියෝව වර දෙකක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Explain any new words using Google Translator.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන කිහිපයක් විස්තර කරන්න.
Google மொழிபெயர்ப்பாளரைப் பயன்படுத்தி சில புதிய வார்த்தைகளை விளக்குங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Watch the video.
වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
